race.comment: STUNG (5) returned in style at Pakenham when ducking back up the inside to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. She's sure to have come on with that run under her belt, with her sectionals suggesting she'll relish rising to the mile. SILVASISTA (6) dominated fresh then ran into a smart one in Salty Pearl at Caulfield, putting a good gap on the rest. Peaking now and looms as a major threat. DIRTY OLD TOWN (3) is race-fit and airborne, only just missing here in the Guineas on Cup Day after leaving herself with too much to do. She'll be hoping for a strong tempo so she can launch late. MATING CALL (2) hit a flat spot fresh before picking up again late to grab fourth. She's much better suited out to the mile, though she'll need some luck from the wide gate. Watch for her late. KAKADU SUNSET (7) battled away soundly when resuming at Warwick Farm. Has jumped out sharply since and is drawn to advantage, so she's worth keeping safe for a sharp Sydney stable.
